message:
fix(engine): harden interpreter register bounds, parser error handling, serde naming, and entry API usage

Seven targeted correctness fixes across core engine modules:

- baseline_interpreter: add bounds check on register index before
  write_reg in Call/MethodCall paths; fix string concatenation with
  non-string types to match JS semantics (Object→"[object Object]",
  Function→"function")
- parser: replace two expect("non-empty events") panics with proper
  Err returns in ParseEventIr materialization
- array_fast_lane: return ElementKindTransition directly from
  transition() instead of unnecessary last().cloned().unwrap()
- execution_cell: replace insert+get_mut+expect("just inserted")
  patterns with idiomatic BTreeMap::entry() API
- ts_normalization: fix SourceLanguage serde from snake_case
  (java_script/type_script) to explicit per-variant rename
  (javascript/typescript)
- versioned_rewrite_pack: replace dedup() with dedup_by() keyed on
  (rule_a, rule_b, kind, is_blocking) so symmetric pairs with
  different descriptions collapse correctly; remove unnecessary clone
- hindsight_escalation_bundle: use struct update syntax in tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
